title: Győr, Győr-Moson-Sopron — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Győr, Győr-Moson-Sopron: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Győr is a city in Győr-Moson-Sopron with a population of 133,946. A prosperous city in northwestern Hungary, home to the Audi manufacturing plant, a beautifully restored Baroque old town, and a strategic location near Vienna and Bratislava.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
